title: Bastian Rookswood

summary: Founder of Skylarkift.

Bastian Rookswood is the founder of Skylarkift. Bastian shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Skylarkift
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Bastian Rookswood.
---

Skylarkift is a seed-stage company. Founded by Bastian Rookswood. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Skylarkift call with Bastian Rookswood.
Bastian is worried the Skylarkift pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
Bastian prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
